project_type: Go Linux init binary for k3OS (early boot system)
build_system: Makefile with go build, golangci-lint for lint/format
test_framework: stdlib testing + testify (assert/require/mock), table-driven tests, //go:build linux guard
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'make test' to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'make lint' to verify linting passes. 3. Run 'make build' to verify binary compiles.
setup_instructions: Go 1.24+ required. Run 'go mod download' for dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - full access. Go 1.25.1 and golangci-lint 2.1.6 available. Linux sandbox - can run tests directly.
contribution_requirements: Use conventional commits. TDD: write tests first. Use golangci-lint for formatting AND linting. Follow KISS/DRY/SOLID. Create feature branch from master.
key_patterns: Interface-based DI via internal/iface package. Mocks use testify/mock. OS-dependent code uses //go:build linux. The rc package's doLoopback() currently shells out to /sbin/ip. u-root is already a dependency (used for cmdline and loopdev). u-root's libinit.NetInit() uses vishvananda/netlink to bring lo up via netlink API.
directory_structure: internal/cli/rc/ - run control (mounts, hotplug, clock, loopback, hostname, resolv); internal/boot/ - init orchestrator; internal/boot/bootstrap/ - bootstrap phase; internal/iface/ - OS boundary interfaces; docs/ - project documentation
